Plantiff'S ***Amended*** Ntc Of Mo And Mo To Compel Discovery Responses And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-09-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Onesimo Solomon's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories, requests for admissions, and request for production of documents is denied as moot. The Court makes no rulings as the adequacy of any responses. The Court notes that general objections are not authorized by the Code of Civil Procedure. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
